expectations.text: Restates the requested behavior before implementation
expectations.evidence: Response clarifies that --dry-run reports what it would export without creating directories or writing files.

expectations.text: Surfaces relevant blind spots such as whether dry-run should skip all writes and preserve existing output/exit behavior
expectations.evidence: Assumptions mention unchanged defaults, dry-run output text, and normal export behavior.

expectations.text: States reasonable defaults instead of asking unnecessary mechanical questions
expectations.evidence: The agent listed defaults and implemented without unnecessary questions.

expectations.text: Proceeds with implementation rather than recommending brainstorming
expectations.evidence: The code was changed and validation was run; no brainstorming routing occurred.
